internal_issues.description: ESA citation generic (www.esa.int) without referencing specific Gaia DR3 paper (Gaia Collaboration et al. 2023, A&A 674, A1)

suggested_patch.replace: Replace with Gaia Collaboration 2023 DOI citation + arctan math + non-rigid wobble defense + photometric cross-validation

internal_issues.description: Does not preempt non-rigid wobble defense — needs to call out unfalsifiable free parameter
No math showing arctan(20/9,086,000) ≈ 0.454 arcsec — rigid wobble gives one fixed value, not 1/d range
Finding field says '+16.5 to -14.1 min' but evidence says '+16.4 to −14.3 min'; '6.9 is cherry-picked RMS' is ambiguous

suggested_patch.find: Equation of time ranges +16.5 to -14.1 min; 6.9 is cherry-picked RMS
suggested_patch.replace: Equation of time ranges +16.4 to −14.3 min; 6.9 is obliquity sub-component RMS only (full equation-of-time RMS = 8.8 min)

internal_issues.description: Evidence doesn't identify where 6.9 comes from clearly enough; 'cherry-picked RMS' accusation was vague when finding said 6.9 IS the RMS
Day length vs equation of time distinction glossed over in finding

suggested_patch.replace: DEFERRED: Current evidence text already addresses this distinction ('day length is a misnomer here'). The finding field is a one-liner summary and can only expand so much without becoming a paragraph. The evidence provides the full explanation. Acceptable as-is.

internal_issues.description: '10 significant figures' LLR claim for 18.613-year period not verified

suggested_patch.replace: Remove '10 sig fig' claim; add Antikythera mechanism history; improve LLR description

internal_issues.description: 'Known for 250 years' implies ~1776; should be 'known for over 2,000 years' (Babylonians, Antikythera)

suggested_patch.find: Non-discriminating: period is an input (known for 250 years); dome's gears have no physical driver or amplitude prediction
suggested_patch.replace: Non-discriminating: period is an input (known for over 2,000 years, encoded in Antikythera mechanism ~100 BC); dome's gears have no physical driver or amplitude prediction

internal_issues.description: LRR link to lpi.usra.edu describes hardware, not period measurement; tangential citation

suggested_patch.replace: covered — new evidence text drops tangential hardware link

internal_issues.description: Verdict framing could be sharper: 'post-hoc appropriation' more precise than 'taken from literature'

suggested_patch.find: The ~950 AD date is taken from published paleomagnetic literature (Campuzano 2019), not derived from dome geometry. Linking it to a theological timeline without a physical mechanism is unfalsifiable.
suggested_patch.replace: The ~950 AD date is taken directly from published paleomagnetic literature (Campuzano et al. 2019) — post-hoc appropriation of a scientific result, not prediction. Linking it to a theological timeline (Revelation 20, 'Satan's little season') without deriving the date from dome parameters is unfalsifiable.

internal_issues.description: Evidence too terse; strawmans dome's claim by ignoring functional r=0 role; '6-Text Convergence' never identified

suggested_patch.find: This is a theological interpretation, not a testable physical claim. No physical mechanism or measurable consequence is specified.
